params.name: Mask of Zorro
params.description:
On Sep 17, AD 1575, Torro put on this black mask and launched a big operation.

Miguel, the new governor of Spain, was assassinated. Before he died, he passed his position and official seal to his friend Diego, the top swordsman in Europe. Meanwhile, a masked man appeared from nowhere and started punishing the evil and helping the weak. Zorro's fame spread like wildfire, causing the rulers a headache. Eventually, he killed Colonel Huerta and ended his dictatorship. Zorro managed to escape the si …
